title: Conditional rendering based on touch capability with SSR-safe defaults
scenario_context: Render different UI for touch vs mouse. SSR must default to one without hydration mismatch.
responsive_reasoning: 1. SSR default touch (safer for mobile-first).\n2. Client adjusts post-hydrate.\n3. useSyncExternalStore.
solution: // hooks/useMediaQuery.ts already SSR-safe (see responsive-001).\n// Default to mobile-first for SSR (touch).\n// Components consume via useDevice context (responsive-227).

title: Stats card grid that adapts cells based on container
scenario_context: Stats cards (revenue, users, etc.). Wide container: 4 cards row. Narrow: 2x2. Very narrow: stacked.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container queries.\n2. Auto-fit grid.\n3. Variable density.
solution: // See responsive-064 ResponsiveGrid applied to stats

title: Card title that auto-resizes via fit-text technique
scenario_context: Card titles vary in length. Use clamp + container query so titles fit without truncation when possible.
responsive_reasoning: 1. cqi-based size shrinks.\n2. Long titles fit at smaller size.\n3. Per responsive-108.
solution: // See responsive-108 ScalingCard for cqi pattern.

title: Section header with sticky positioning that respects safe area
scenario_context: Section headers (Today, Yesterday) sticky as scrolling. Top offset respects safe area.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Sticky top with env.\n2. Section headers.\n3. Universal.

title: Toolbar button that shows label on hover and on focus for keyboard
scenario_context: Icon-only toolbar buttons. Hover/focus shows tooltip label. Touch doesn't (icon implies).
responsive_reasoning: 1. Tooltip on hover/focus.\n2. aria-label always.\n3. Per responsive-035.
solution: // See responsive-035 InfoTooltip pattern applied to toolbar.

title: Quick-reply suggestions above keyboard for chat
scenario_context: Suggestions ('Hi', 'Thanks', custom) appear above keyboard for quick replies.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Position above input.\n2. visualViewport aware.\n3. Per responsive-186.
solution: // Per responsive-021 Composer with added quick replies row above textarea.

title: Drawer that respects opposite-side safe area in landscape
scenario_context: Drawer slides from one side. Notch on opposite side — content doesn't need to respect, but drawer might.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Drawer respects all-edge safe area.\n2. env() per edge.\n3. Universal.
solution: // See responsive-053 FullscreenModal pattern applied to drawer.

title: Map with controls adapting per orientation (top vs side)
scenario_context: Map app. Portrait: controls at top. Landscape phone: side. Per orientation.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-054.\n2. Map + controls orientation-aware.\n3. Universal.
solution: // See responsive-054 MapWithDetails.

title: iPad app gesture: edge swipe to dismiss page (like iOS native)
scenario_context: Edge swipe from left edge dismisses current page (like iOS Safari back). Or app-level routing.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Detect edge swipe.\n2. Coordinate with browser gesture.\n3. App-specific implementation.
edge_cases_handled: Browser already does it — could be redundant
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Native-feel gesture. 2) Coordinated with browser. 3) Touch-only.

title: Trello card detail view inline desktop, full-screen mobile
scenario_context: Click Trello card. Desktop: modal overlay. Mobile: full-screen page.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Modal overlay desktop.\n2. Full screen mobile.\n3. URL drives.
solution: // See responsive-040 ListWithDetail pattern with modal/fullscreen variant.

title: Density toggle: compact, default, comfortable table rows
scenario_context: User can set table density. Affects row padding.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Density as CSS variable.\n2. User setting persists.\n3. Affects all rows.

title: Inline form validation with debounced visual feedback
scenario_context: Field validates on blur or after typing pause. Visual feedback (red/green) appears.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Validate on blur or debounced typing.\n2. Visual state.\n3. aria-invalid for SR.

title: Video with PIP and fullscreen buttons adapt position by viewport
scenario_context: Video controls. Desktop: inline. Mobile: floating PIP + native fullscreen.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Adaptive control layout.\n2. Per responsive-235.\n3. Universal.
solution: // See responsive-235 VideoWithPip.

title: Page transitions with View Transitions API for smooth nav
scenario_context: Navigation between pages. Modern browsers support View Transitions API for smooth fades.
responsive_reasoning: 1. View Transitions native.\n2. Reduced motion respected.\n3. Per responsive-253.
solution: // See responsive-253 GalleryThumbnail for View Transition pattern.

title: Image gallery overlay with swipe between images
scenario_context: Lightbox. Swipe horizontally between images. Per responsive-098.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Swipe between.\n2. Pointer events.\n3. Per responsive-098.
solution: // See responsive-098 Lightbox + responsive-155 DraggableCarousel.

title: Touchscreen monitor: hover + touch hybrid handling
scenario_context: Touchscreen laptop. Has mouse + touch + keyboard. UI must work all three.
responsive_reasoning: 1. any-pointer: fine + any-pointer: coarse can both be true.\n2. Handle all three.\n3. Per responsive-085.
solution: // See responsive-085 PreviewableLink for hybrid pattern.

title: Hook to detect prefers-reduced-data and adjust assets
scenario_context: User has saveData enabled. Skip videos, smaller images, fewer requests.
responsive_reasoning: 1. matchMedia prefers-reduced-data.\n2. Combined with connection effectiveType.\n3. Adapt asset loading.

title: Statistics widget with sparkline that scales with container
scenario_context: KPI widget with number + sparkline. Sparkline grows with container width.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Sparkline fills available.\n2. Number cqi-scaled.\n3. Always visible.
accessibility_across_viewports: Real heading. Sparkline aria-hidden (data via label/text).

title: List items with consistent fluid line-height matching paragraph
scenario_context: ul/ol items with same line-height as p for vertical rhythm.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Inherit line-height from body.\n2. Consistent rhythm.\n3. Per responsive-274.

title: Layout with sidebar that stays at intrinsic content width
scenario_context: Sidebar width is intrinsic (fits content). Not arbitrary. Avoids empty space or cramped.
responsive_reasoning: 1. width: fit-content or min-content.\n2. Content drives width.\n3. Up to max.

title: Gesture indicators (e.g., 'Swipe to delete') visible only on touch
scenario_context: Show 'Swipe ←' hint on touch. Desktop sees regular delete button.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Hint visible only touch.\n2. @media (pointer: coarse).\n3. Desktop has different affordance.
solution: // Inside list item\n// Swipe ←\n//

title: Multi-line search with newlines via Shift+Enter
scenario_context: Multi-line search. Enter submits. Shift+Enter newline. Touch may have different.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Enter = submit (per responsive-052).\n2. Shift+Enter = newline.\n3. Touch keyboards default newline.

title: Mobile webview embedded in native app: respect minus-area native bar
scenario_context: Web embedded in native app (Instagram in-app browser). Native bottom bar overlays. Adjust padding.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Detect webview.\n2. Add fallback padding.\n3. Per responsive-106.
solution: // See responsive-106 EnvAwareFeature pattern.

title: Comic reader: single page portrait, two pages landscape
scenario_context: Comic book reader. Portrait: single page. Landscape: two pages.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-205.\n2. Comic-specific.\n3. Reading flow.
solution: // See responsive-205 BookSpread.

title: iPad split-screen optimization: master pane primary, detail collapsible
scenario_context: iPad split view has limited width per app. Optimize master-detail to work in 600px.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-009.\n2. Master can hide when detail open.\n3. Toggle.
solution: // See responsive-009 ProjectDashboard.

title: Documentation with sidebar + content + on-this-page outline
scenario_context: Docs page. Wide: 3 panes (nav + content + outline). Mid: 2 (nav + content). Narrow: 1.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Progressive collapse.\n2. Outline first to hide.\n3. Per responsive-130.
solution: // See responsive-130 ArticleWithOutline pattern.

title: Quick filters above table (status pills) that collapse to dropdown narrow
scenario_context: Status filter pills above table. Wide: visible inline. Narrow: dropdown.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container queries.\n2. Pills vs dropdown.\n3. Same filter logic.
solution: // See responsive-041 TableControls + variant for pill style.

title: Survey/quiz UI with one question per page on mobile, multiple on desktop
scenario_context: Survey form. Mobile: one question per screen. Desktop: see multiple, scroll.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Mobile pagination per question.\n2. Desktop scrollable form.\n3. Same data model.
solution: // Similar pattern to multi-step form (responsive-027 + pagination)\n// Mobile: state.currentStep + Next/Back. Desktop: all questions visible in form.

title: Audio recorder UI with waveform visualization
scenario_context: Audio recorder. Visualize live waveform during recording. Adapts width.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-359.\n2. Live data from AudioContext.\n3. Container-aware.
solution: // Combines responsive-359 Waveform + recording mic input via AudioContext.

title: Sidebar with collapsible groups (folder tree)
scenario_context: Sidebar with collapsible folder tree. Each folder can expand/collapse.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-131.\n2. Native details/summary.\n3. Persistent state.
solution: // See responsive-131 TreeTable adapted to sidebar.
